testcase.name: test_admin_review_unacknowledged_policy_fails

skipped.message: No unacknowledged policies to test admin review rejection

testcase.name: test_audit_logs_compliance_filter

failure.message: AssertionError: Log should have timestamp assert 'timestamp' in {'action': 'policy_admin_reviewed', 'created_at': '2026-03-28T13:34:11.785774+00:00', 'details': {'admin_name': 'System Admin', 'employee_id': 'd88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77', 'employee_name': 'Olakunle Alonge', 'policy_id': '6cabbf8f-b09a-4bca-b8fd-08f63f04c62e', ...}, 'entity_id': 'b74a2994-2430-48bc-8864-c17dd88a2d75', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_policy_acknowledgement.py:293: in test_audit_logs_compliance_filter assert "timestamp" in log, "Log should have timestamp" E AssertionError: Log should have timestamp E assert 'timestamp' in {'action': 'policy_admin_reviewed', 'created_at': '2026-03-28T13:34:11.785774+00:00', 'details': {'admin_name': 'System Admin', 'employee_id': 'd88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77', 'employee_name': 'Olakunle Alonge', 'policy_id': '6cabbf8f-b09a-4bca-b8fd-08f63f04c62e', ...}, 'entity_id': 'b74a2994-2430-48bc-8864-c17dd88a2d75', ...}
